title: 등록
description: 자신이 백준 온라인 저지(BOJ)에서 맞은 문제의 수와 아이디를 그대로 출력하는 프로그램을 작성하시오.
output: 첫 줄에 자신이 맞은 문제의 수, 둘째 줄에 아이디를 출력한다.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Korea, Nationwide Internet Competition, Daejeon Nationalwide Internet Competition 2013, ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Korea, Nationwide Internet Competition, Daejeon Nationalwide Internet Competition 2014, ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Korea, Nationwide Internet Competition, Daejeon Nationalwide Internet Competition 2015, ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Korea, Nationwide Internet Competition, Daejeon Nationalwide Internet Competition 2016, ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Korea, Nationwide Internet Competition, Daejeon Nationalwide Internet Competition 2017, ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Korea, Nationwide Internet Competition, Seoul Nationalwide Internet Competition 2018, ICPC, Regionals, Asia Pacific, Korea, Nationwide Internet Competition, Seoul Nationalwide Internet Competition 2019, baekjoon
